expectations.text: At least one raster image file (.png/.jpg/.webp) exists in the outputs directory
The produced image file is a valid, non-empty image that decodes correctly
The image was generated via the Codex CLI (generate_image.sh / codex exec), not faked, drawn as SVG/ASCII, or downloaded
expectations.evidence: generate_image.sh invoked codex exec; original cached under ~/.codex/generated_images/019e40f1-...

expectations.text: The final saved image path was reported back to the user
expectations.evidence: Agent reported the full saved path
